raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The passage opens and closes with an explicit contribution claim ('first field-validated hybrid local/central V2G dispatch architecture'); any substantive review must assess whether the framing accurately captures what the deployment actually demonstrated.","R1.3":"Four specific quantitative results (18.4% peak reduction, 71% regulation revenue capture, 1.2% SoC violation rate, 63% backhaul reduction) are stated without inline derivation; tracing each number to the described two-stage methodology is central to any honest look at the paragraph.","R1.4":"'First field-validated' is a strong priority claim; the delegation almost certainly requires checking whether Wang et al. and Hossain's work, as described, actually leaves this delta open or whether the novelty assertion is overreaching.","R1.6":"'Take a look at this paragraph' most naturally licenses prose-level feedback; sentence clarity, hedging language, and paragraph cohesion are at minimum centrally expected even if deeper technical review is also in scope."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review focus on writing quality and prose clarity (R1.6 load-bearing), or on the technical and scientific substance—novelty of the 'first field-validated' claim, evidence-to-claim traceability of the four reported metrics, and accuracy of contribution framing (R1.1, R1.3, R1.4 load-bearing)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The passage opens and closes with an explicit contribution claim ('first field-validated hybrid local/central V2G dispatch architecture'); any substantive review must assess whether the framing accurately captures what the deployment actually demonstrated.
rationale.R1.3: Four specific quantitative results (18.4% peak reduction, 71% regulation revenue capture, 1.2% SoC violation rate, 63% backhaul reduction) are stated without inline derivation; tracing each number to the described two-stage methodology is central to any honest look at the paragraph.
rationale.R1.4: 'First field-validated' is a strong priority claim; the delegation almost certainly requires checking whether Wang et al. and Hossain's work, as described, actually leaves this delta open or whether the novelty assertion is overreaching.
rationale.R1.6: 'Take a look at this paragraph' most naturally licenses prose-level feedback; sentence clarity, hedging language, and paragraph cohesion are at minimum centrally expected even if deeper technical review is also in scope.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review focus on writing quality and prose clarity (R1.6 load-bearing), or on the technical and scientific substance—novelty of the 'first field-validated' claim, evidence-to-claim traceability of the four reported metrics, and accuracy of contribution framing (R1.1, R1.3, R1.4 load-bearing)?
